title: salix glauca var. glabrescens
intro: Salix glauca var. glabrescens, also known as the dwarf willow or white willow, is a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). The medicinal properties of Salix glauca var. glabrescens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Salix glauca var. glabrescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
